completed_tasks.name: Verify build artifacts and plugin structure

human_actions_pending.action: Review and merge PR #1 on GitHub after teammate tests the branch
human_actions_pending.context: feat/plugin-scaffold-sidechain — full test instructions in PR description

decisions.decision: Renamed plugin from ChordVocoder to Canary
decisions.rationale: Project/repo name is Canary — naming should be consistent throughout
Team uses Logic Pro exclusively; Logic requires AU for native sidechain routing UI

decisions.decision: Docs folder lives in the canary repo, not a separate repo
decisions.rationale: Simpler for collaboration — partner clones one repo and gets everything
GSD config is per-developer (model preferences, parallelization) — each dev should have their own

decisions.decision: Plugin code set to Cnry (same as manufacturer code)
decisions.rationale: Auto-set during rename; should be updated to a unique 4-char code before distribution

next_action: Once PR #1 is merged, run /gsd:plan-phase 2 to plan Phase 2 (vocoder DSP engine)
context_notes: Phase 1 is fully complete and verified. PR #1 is open on GitHub with detailed test instructions for the teammate. The Docs repo was collapsed into the main canary repo during this session. GSD workflow is set up and healthy.
